privacyPolicy.title: Privacy Policy
privacyPolicy.content:
At Aaj Bites, we respect your privacy and are committed to protecting your personal information. This policy explains what information we collect, how we use it, and how we keep it safe.

Information We Collect

When you interact with us (place an order, contact us, or browse our website), we may collect:

  • You Name
  • Email
  • Phone number
  • Delivery address
  • Order details
  • Any message or feedback you share

We only collect what is necessary to serve you better.

How We Use Your Information

We use your information to:

  • Process and deliver your orders
  • Contact you regarding your order
  • Improve our menu, service, and customer experience
  • Respond to your queries or feedback

We do not use your data for anything unrelated to your experience with us.

Data Protection

We take reasonable steps to keep your information safe and secure. Your data is handled carefully and only accessible to those who need it to process your order or assist you.

Sharing Your Information

We do not sell, rent, or trade your personal information.

Your information may only be shared when necessary, such as:

  • With delivery partners to complete your order
  • If required by law

Contact Us

If you have any questions about this policy or how your data is handled, feel free to reach out:

Aaj Bites
Email: info@aajbites.com
Phone: +91 9876543210
